purpose: Two follow-ups from predecessor LANE01-LAW-LANE-3-PUBLISH-AND-QOT-BRIDGE-AUDIT-V1 (merge f08348f3): (1) publish LAW-NTS-LANE-3 v1.1 to laws/ at root + create LAW_INDEX_MASTER.md (closes Item A deferred); (2) apply QOT bridge audit verdict NO to CANON_V2_RECONCILIATION_PROPOSAL §6 (BRIDGE_TBD → NAMING_COLLISION_NO_BRIDGE_NEEDED) + update reality audit phantom count (10 → 1).

post_merge_observation.title: Sync workflow paths whitelist did not include laws/** or LAW_INDEX_MASTER.md
post_merge_observation.evidence: First post-merge sync run 25129788125 = SUCCESS, BUT laws/LAW-NTS-LANE-3_v1.md and LAW_INDEX_MASTER.md returned 404 from Live mirror. Reconciliation §6 update DID propagate (audits/ecosystem/** was already whitelisted).
post_merge_observation.root_cause: Same pattern as HD-03 from LANE01-CANON-V2-RECONCILIATION-V1: the sync workflow's paths whitelist is opt-in, not blanket. New top-level dirs (laws/) and root files (LAW_INDEX_MASTER.md) need explicit entries.
post_merge_observation.fix_applied: Extended sync_runtime_to_public.yml: added 'laws/**' + 'LAW_INDEX_MASTER.md' to paths whitelist + cp block (mkdir + cp -R for laws/, cp for LAW_INDEX_MASTER.md). Defence-in-depth: same pattern as HD-03 fix.
post_merge_observation.post_fix_verification: After this post-merge commit pushes, second sync run will copy the missing files. Will verify with curl on the same 4 evidence URLs (target: 200 OK).
